inputs.label: Setpoint (SP)
inputs.businessContext: Desired target value for the controlled variable.

inputs.label: Process Variable (PV)
inputs.businessContext: Current measured value of the controlled variable.

inputs.label: Proportional Gain (Kp)
inputs.businessContext: Proportional tuning parameter; higher Kp increases control action proportional to error.

inputs.label: Integral Gain (Ki)
inputs.businessContext: Integral tuning parameter; corrects steady‑state error by accumulating past errors.

inputs.label: Derivative Gain (Kd)
inputs.businessContext: Derivative tuning parameter; anticipates future error based on rate of change.

inputs.label: Time Step (Δt)
inputs.businessContext: Sampling interval or control loop period.

inputs.label: Previous Error
inputs.businessContext: Error from the previous sampling instant (e(k-1)).

inputs.label: Integral Accumulator
inputs.businessContext: Accumulated integral term up to the previous step (Σ e·Δt).

formulas.primary: Kp*(setpoint - processVariable) + Ki*(integral + (setpoint - processVariable)*dt) + Kd*((setpoint - processVariable) - previousError)/dt
